# Medicus Onboarding — practice pack

Role-based Medicus training for every job in the surgery: guided pathways,
clickable walkthroughs, knowledge checks and competency sign-off, with
individual PIN logins and a training-lead dashboard.

## Install (5 minutes, no IT ticket)

1. Download the ZIP below and extract it onto your practice **shared drive**
   (e.g. `S:\Medicus Onboarding\`).
2. Open `index.html` in **Edge or Chrome**.
3. The setup wizard asks for your practice name and a training-lead passcode,
   then creates the shared data file — save `medicus-onboarding-data.json`
   **in the same folder**.
4. Add your team from the dashboard; each person sets their own PIN on first
   login.
5. On other machines: open the same `index.html` and choose **Connect to an
   existing data file** once.

Full instructions are in the README inside the ZIP.

**Notes:** PINs deter casual snooping, not determined access — anyone who can
open the shared folder can read the data file. Only training progress is
stored; never patient data. Take an occasional JSON backup from the dashboard.
